questionHtml: The length reached by the rope at C is 77.4 m. Suggest how energy considerations could be used to determine the elastic constant of the rope.
markschemeHtml:
k can be determined using EPE = 1 2 kx2

correct statement or equation showing

GPE at A = EPE at C

OR

(GPE + KE) at B = EPE at C

 

Candidate must clearly indicate the energy associated with either position A or B for MP2.

[2 marks]

meta.title: The length reached by the rope at C is 77.4 m. Suggest how energy considerations could be used to determine the elastic constant of the rope.
